title: dispatch module manifest
description: Portable schema for dispatch module discovery manifests.

name.description: Module namespace. Must match defineModule({ name }).

version.description: Module version string. Must match defineModule({ version }).

entry.description: Relative path to the runtime entry file, for example index.mjs or dist/index.mjs.

metadata.description: Optional arbitrary metadata preserved for tooling and inspection output.

pack.description: Optional pack-time include rules for extra runtime assets.

include.description: Additional file paths, directory paths, or dir/** patterns to include when packaging a module bundle.
